pi_items.metadata_value: Use GIMP's Shadows-Highlights tool to brighten shadows and improve tonal balance in an underexposed image
pi_items.verified_value: PRIMARY IMAGE: Mean luminance 103.2 (NOT underexposed); FALLBACK IMAGE: Mean luminance 87.3 (IS underexposed)
pi_items.source: Downloaded and analyzed both Unsplash images using PIL/numpy. Calculated luminance via ITU-R BT.601 (0.299*R + 0.587*G + 0.114*B). Mean luminance >= 100 indicates not underexposed.

pi_items.metadata_value: Image downloaded from Unsplash URLs in setup_shadows_task.sh
pi_items.source: Downloaded both images successfully from the URLs specified in setup_shadows_task.sh lines 13-15

pi_items.metadata_value: Image suitable for shadow recovery (claimed underexposed)
pi_items.source: PIL Image analysis of downloaded photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4, converted to RGB, calculated luminance using ITU-R BT.601 weights

pi_items.metadata_value: Image has dark shadows needing recovery
pi_items.source: Luminance histogram analysis of primary image shows approximately 11,617 pixels below luminance 20 out of 426,400 total pixels (800x533)

pi_items.metadata_value: Fallback image available if primary fails
pi_items.source: PIL Image analysis of fallback photo-1469474968028-56623f02e42e

pi_items.metadata_value: GIMP 2.10 has Shadows-Highlights tool at Colors > Shadows-Highlights
pi_items.verified_value: True - Tool introduced in GIMP 2.4, available in all GIMP 2.10 installations
pi_items.source: GIMP documentation: Shadows-Highlights is standard color adjustment tool in GIMP 2.4+

pi_items.metadata_value: Shadow brightness must increase by at least 10%
Very dark pixels must reduce by at least 25%
At least 10% of pixels must show significant tonal change (>5 luminance points)
Task passes if at least 3 of 4 criteria met (75% score)

privileged_info_summary: The task aims to adjust shadows and highlights in an image using GIMP 2.10's Shadows-Highlights tool. The PRIMARY source image (Unsplash photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4, 800x533 JPEG) has mean luminance 103.2 and is NOT underexposed, contradicting the task description claim of an 'underexposed image'. However, a FALLBACK image (photo-1469474968028-56623f02e42e, 800x531 JPEG) with mean luminance 87.3 IS underexposed and better matches the task description. Both images contain significant shadow areas (2.72-6.84% very dark pixels). The verifier checks four criteria: shadow brightness increase ≥10%, very dark pixel reduction ≥25%, histogram improvement (10th/25th percentile increase), and ≥10% pixels with >5 luminance change. Passing requires ≥75% score (3 of 4 criteria). Task timeout is 90 seconds with max 7 steps.
